title: Preliminary Design Review (PDR)
description: Submit comprehensive preliminary design documentation including rocket specifications, recovery system design, payload details, and project management plan.

title: Critical Design Review (CDR)
description: Final design review with detailed technical drawings, manufacturing plans, test procedures, and flight readiness assessment.

title: Flight Readiness Review (FRR)
description: Present completed rocket, demonstrate all systems, and prove readiness for competition launch.

title: Competition Launch Week
description: Travel to Huntsville, Alabama for the main competition launch event. Includes setup, safety briefings, launches, and awards ceremony.

title: Technical Paper Submission
description: Submit technical paper detailing rocket design, engineering analysis, and testing results.

title: Competition Week
description: Main competition event at Spaceport America. Multiple launch opportunities, technical presentations, and networking events.
